texto: If somebody's getting depressed in life, I would say, "Look at me'. I've got here believing in me. Sometimes, things do not go as you expected and you could feel as if you were ruining everything. But Everything can be only the path to get to the success of your dream. You can not fail until you give up. As long as you keep going, you are on the path for your success.

texto: The more I drive myself into the depth of my inside, the more things come up to my vision, visibly or invisibly... I even do not know if I am seeing them with my eye or with my mind. I just need to copy them on my canvases. But this mental process is always overwhelming. I often have hard time to deal with my emotion on this state. You could call this depression on surface? But actually, so many 're-birth' and 'reform' are going on on my thoughts, inspiration, philosophy...etc in the underwater. I believe this struggle make my art real. My art always comes from my emotion.

texto: I love fortune readings! because when I get in troubles, if the reading says that I am in a lucky day, I can think my troubles are just some kind of mistakes, and if the reading says that I am in the unlucky day, I can think that my troubles are just because of my bad luck. Either ways, I can know the reason of my troubles.
explicacao: Citação de Hiroko Sakai sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love fortune readings! because when I get in troubles, if the reading says that I am in a lucky…” articula humor, fate, fortune-telling em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como fortune-telling e funny.

texto: In every motions to put colors on my canvas, I feel like I am screaming, "I AM HERE"... To whom?.. To where?... Where am I going to...?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hiroko Sakai: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “In every motions to put colors on my canvas, I feel like I am screaming, "I AM HERE"... To whom?.…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, art, artist pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de artist e color.

texto: Real Friends' are someone who are right next to you when you got in emergency, not in only parties.
